checks.finding: No issues found. Technology choices in design.md Components and frontend-spec.md Technology Stack/Dependencies each carry a stated rationale (Node>=20, js-yaml with rejected alternative, esbuild justified by dist-commit distribution at REQ-008). ADR-0002/0003 carry the two architectural decisions with Accepted status.

No issues found. design.md OQ-001 states Owner: ai-implementer, Blocks Implementation: no, and a concrete Resolution Path. requirements.md OQ-R1 is non-blocking with owner human and a resolution trigger.

investigation.md is absent, but each of the 3 Assumptions entries carries an inline grounding basis (existing CI configuration; installer's pre-existing Claude CLI requirement; stated MIT license classification cross-referenced in security-spec.md SBOM and frontend-spec.md Dependencies), satisfying the reasonable-technical-default-with-cited-basis criterion.

Round-1 Critical finding resolved. design.md ## Constraint Compliance (lines 195-206) now contains 8 rows covering every constraint in requirements.md, including the newly added row for the 2 MiB file-size limit (REQ-005/REQ-006, Edge Cases + AC-017) with Design Response citing path-guard size check, too-large error, DoS mitigation, and cross-reference to security-spec.md STRIDE DoS row and Data Plan's 2 MiB limit.

infra-spec.md Service Level Objectives states numeric targets (tool response p95 <= 500 ms; startup <= 1 s) measured via smoke test and node --test instrumentation, verified by AC-005 and referenced from design.md Layer Specifications and Test Strategy.

design.md ## Deployment / CI Plan states deployment target (INSTALL_ROOT/mcp/sdd-forge-mcp/, local stdio process), CI pipeline changes (mcp-tests 3-OS job, dist-parity step, installer test additions), and installer flag gating (--skip-mcp/--mcp). Data Plan states no schema changes, so migration execution order is correctly not required.
design.md Data Plan states 'Existing Data Affected: なし（読み取りのみ）' and 'Migration Strategy: 不要'. Per check rule, a No-data-changes statement yields PASS.

The server makes no runtime cross-service API calls (stdio-only, no network). The only external touchpoints are installer-time CLI registrations, addressed with failure behavior (Node>=20 absent -> installer warns and skips MCP; Codex CLI handling via OQ-001 resolution path). No unaddressed external integration found.

tools/core.ts (8) and tools/evidence.ts (5) match REQ-002/REQ-003 exactly by name; resources.ts (5) matches REQ-004 URI list exactly. No additional endpoints, entities, or components beyond requirements; all Goals/User Stories are represented. No scope creep or omission detected.

High-risk surfaces (path-guard authorization; oversized-input DoS; read-only guarantee) each have named validation paths: TEST-003/TEST-004 (Security Boundaries + security-spec.md Security Tests), TEST-002/TEST-004 (STRIDE DoS row), TEST-011 (static + snapshot check). No PII/payment/critical-journey surface exists (non-UI feature).
